completed_since_last_snapshot: ENTIRE PHASE P4 COMPLETED AND VERIFIED this session (docs/verification/P4.md). P4 execution plan authored via adversarial review (dm-0022-dm-0029): opened src/eval/ under a one-way dependency rule (sim never imports eval); assigned replay-tape serialization ownership (open since P2) to src/schema/TapeIO.ts; separated the agent RNG stream from the sim RNG; resolved the exploit-envelope, tier-interpolation, and chapter-input open questions.

S4.1 harness: src/schema/TapeIO.ts (versioned canonical replay tape, strict P2-style parse) + src/eval/{AgentPolicy,Archetypes,AgentHarness}.ts — five data-parameterized archetypes (firstTime/cautious/experienced/expertSpeedrunner/curiousExplorer) over one decision core drive the sim headlessly in CANONICAL_PIPELINE order; live-run === tape-replay bit-equality per archetype; budgeted 'timeout' halting.

S4.2 solvability: src/eval/local/Search.ts (bounded deterministic macro-action BFS, quantized dedup, death/goal leaves, optional forbidden constraint) + Solvability.ts (archetype fast path + search; witness tapes; a TWO-JUMP level is UNSOLVABLE by construction — the axiom is read from world.jumpLock, never re-implemented).

S4.3 softlock: src/eval/local/Softlock.ts (exhaustive graph + backward reachability of goal/death; trapped = reaches neither; death=escape). S4.4 exploit: Exploit.ts (challenge envelope = corridor lethal-hazard danger zones; skip-constrained search finds hazard-avoiding completions). S4.5 optimization: Optimization.ts (five tiers from archetype spread, delta=Discovery-WR, minimal-delta rejection, par cross-check).

S4.6 macro: src/eval/macro/Curriculum.ts — PURE Macro Curriculum Validation over an ordered CurriculumLevel[] (the minimal chapter contract, dm-0029); four §15 criteria (Cognitive Structural Mapping, Cross-Chapter Degradation, Curiosity Progression, Graduation Assessment) + chapter-health precondition; import-isolation scan-enforced (REQ-140).

S4.7: docs/verification/P4.md filed; REQ-140/141 -> VERIFIED (dm-0008); REQ-142/101/102 correctly stay IN_PROGRESS (P6/P10 remainder); subtractive pass 0 findings; eval math-whitelist audit clean; IRD + execution_plan P4 section CLOSED; backlog rollup 35/17/0/15.

critical_warnings_for_next_session: RUN THE REBOOT LIFECYCLE FIRST: confirm pkg_hash s4-f6c7d8 matches meta/project_knowledge_graph.json, npm test expect 240 passing.
CONTENT GENERATION STAYS HARD-GATED until M2 (P4+P5+P6) is fully VERIFIED. P4 is done; P5 and P6 remain. Do NOT author any level/chapter content in P5. Fixtures remain unit scaffolding only.

ONE-WAY DEPENDENCY (dm-0022): nothing under src/{core,systems,components,entities,schema} may import from src/eval/. The EvalIsolation scan test enforces this and the math whitelist — keep both green. P5 scoring code likely also belongs in src/eval/ (evaluation-time), preserving the one-way rule.

THE AXIOM is P4's ground truth (dm-0011/dm-0020): solvability reads world.jumpLock and lets the engine's lock enforce exactly one jump — a two-jump level is unsolvable by construction. Never add a maxJumps field; never re-implement a jump counter in eval.

DETERMINISM: agents drive the sim via InputFrames only and draw from their OWN threaded RngState (dm-0024), never state.rng — this is what makes tape-replay === live-run bit-identical. Never introduce Math.random or delta-time; the eval math whitelist (dm-0017) extends to src/eval/.

CANONICAL PIPELINE ORDER (normative, dm-0021): lifecycle -> entityKinematics -> playerControl -> playerPhysics -> sensors -> hazardsAndGoal. Exported once as CANONICAL_PIPELINE from src/eval/AgentHarness.ts; any engine assembly (P5 harnesses too) must use it.

P4 verdicts are the P5 inputs: SolvabilityVerdict, SoftlockVerdict, ExploitVerdict, OptimizationVerdict, and the macro CurriculumLevel[]/MacroVerdict are the data P5's gates score. Reuse them; do not re-run or re-implement the audits inside P5.

Replay-tape serialization is now OWNED (dm-0023, src/schema/TapeIO.ts) — P8 recorder and P9 saves consume this format; they do not redefine it. Golden canonical sha256 c0ec3b1f... (LevelRoundTrip) still anchored; schema locks dm-0009..dm-0015 in force.
Do NOT change FIXED_STEP_SECONDS (dm-0003); never mutate GameState in place (dm-0004).
